title.rendered: How To Manage Risks & Challenges In An Organization

content.rendered: Every company relies on experts to deal with risk and manage important challenges in the organization. Even though it’s critically important, few companies have systems in place to identify, enable and teach experts. Alan Berrey, the author of Beyond Expertise, is an expert on experts and has powerful ideas on how to support experts, recognize their value, and even how to spot fakers. He is joined by host, David Reske, who is the CEO of Nowspeed. One concept to look out for is how experts love risk because to them it’s no big deal. Listen now and learn how to get the most from the experts in your company!
